{{Chess Opening Theory/Position|= |Mengarini Variation| |rd|nd|bd|qd|kd|bd|nd|rd|= |pd|pd| |pd|pd|pd|pd|pd|= | | | | | | | | |= | | |pd| | | | | |= | | | | |pl| | | |= |pl| | | | | | | |= | |pl|pl|pl| |pl|pl|pl|= |rl|nl|bl|ql|kl|bl|nl|rl|= |aka = Van Duijn’s Variation }} =Mengarini Variation= This opening is an interesting variation of the [[w:Wing Gambit|Wing Gambit]]. The idea is to prepare b4 with a3. The main continuation is [[/2...Nc6/]] although many moves are possible. ==Theory table== {{Chess Opening Theory/Table}}. 1.e4 c5 2.a3
